data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Verified: (1) Agent history view correctly filters user/system type entries when detail toggle is off, with messageTypeFilters taking precedence; default off. (2) Terminal panel uses stateful line filter with chunk-buffering for numbered-line pattern matching; re-renders xterm on toggle change; stderr passthrough preserved. (3) 12 unit tests pass covering edge cases (ANSI, chunk splits, mixed content). (4) Quality gates: typecheck clean, no new lint errors in changed files, build succeeds. No specification drift, no security issues, no regressions.
